meta_title: For Freelancers: passive income to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Passive Income to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no portfolio' trap using AI-driven passive income streams. A beginner's guide to leveraging Antigravity and Claude Code for fast shipping.
content.answer_block: Break the 'no portfolio' cycle by building micro-SaaS tools that generate passive income. Instead of hunting for clients, ship high-utility, automated AI products. Using Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative development, you turn a lack of past work into a library of proprietary, revenue-generating assets.
content.intro:
The blank screen of a portfolio page is the freelancer's greatest enemy. You have the skills, but the market demands proof—a catch-22 that stalls thousands of careers before they truly begin. You’re stuck waiting for permission to build, when you should be building to claim your authority.

Stop chasing clients who want to see 'past work' and start building the work you want to be hired for. By pivoting to passive income projects, you transform your portfolio from a static list of hypothetical designs into a living, breathing ecosystem of revenue. This isn't just about money; it’s about proving your expertise through execution.

steps.title: Define Your Micro-SaaS Niche
steps.description: Identify a repetitive manual task in a niche market (e.g., SEO metadata generator for Shopify) that can be solved with a simple AI wrapper.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the top 5 pain points for small business owners in the e-commerce sector and suggest a micro-SaaS tool that can be built in under 48 hours to automate one specific repetitive task.

steps.title: Rapid Scaffolding
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the boilerplate and core architecture, ensuring clean, production-ready code from the first commit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Next.js 14 project structure with Tailwind CSS, Supabase authentication, and an OpenAI API integration layer for a prompt-based tool.

steps.title: AI-Driven Feature Implementation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to write the core logic, focusing on the AI prompt engineering that powers your passive income engine.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an API route for handling user input, sending it to OpenAI with a system prompt optimized for high-quality, professional output.
steps.claude_code_command: claude commit 'Implement core AI processing logic and prompt injection'

steps.title: Automated Monetization Integration
steps.description: Hook up Stripe to allow for one-time payments or credits, turning your tool into a passive revenue stream.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Stripe integration module that handles webhook events for successful payments and updates the user's credit balance in Supabase.

steps.title: Deployment and Portfolio Launch
steps.description: Deploy to Vercel and list your product on marketplaces like Product Hunt to gain both users and social proof.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a README.md file that highlights the technical architecture and the business problem solved, optimized for a developer portfolio.

pro_tips: Always build with a 'Credit' system rather than infinite usage to control your API costs and protect your margins.
Use Claude Code to document your code as you write it; this makes your repo look professional to potential clients checking your GitHub.
Focus on 'One-Click' functionality; the less a user has to configure, the higher your conversion rate.
Prioritize mobile-first design; most micro-SaaS users will discover your tool via social media links on their phones.
Host your tool on a custom subdomain of your personal portfolio site to link your identity directly to the product's success.
content.next_steps: After your first tool is live, iterate based on user feedback for one week, then move to your second project. Consistency is the secret to scaling your portfolio.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect client and start building the perfect portfolio. Your path to passive income and professional authority begins with your first line of code. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
